(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcy1HM2lnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un sitio para detenerse en la ruta. La atención de sus empleados y el trato es por demás de cordial, muy buena gente. La comida rápida en el shop es buena, tanto las empanadas de jamón y queso, como los sandwiches y otras cosas que preparan. Los precios son muy buenos a diferencia de otras estaciones de servicio donde te matan. MUY RECOMENDABLE PARA DETENERSE.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop along the way. The staff is incredibly friendly and helpful; they're really nice people. The fast food at the convenience store is good, from the ham and cheese empanadas to the sandwiches and other items they prepare. The prices are very reasonable, unlike other gas stations where they rip you off. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNF9tUDJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Si pasas por aca no dejes de probar el sándwich de pan casero manteca y jamón crudo

(Translated by Google)
If you're passing by, be sure to try the homemade bread, butter, and prosciutto sandwich.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien ,cargue combustible, baños impecables ,precios mini shop un poco caros.

(Translated by Google)
Very good, I filled up with fuel, the bathrooms were spotless, but the mini-shop prices were a bit high.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación, buena atención, pasamos la noche con la motorhome, muy tranquilo, hay un espacio protegido por álamos como para entrar 4 combis, lindo lugar para mitad de camino

(Translated by Google)
Very good station, good service, we spent the night with the motorhome, very quiet, there is a space protected by poplars big enough for 4 vans, nice place for halfway

reviews.comment:
Es la estación más completa en la mitad del camino de la RN25 tramo Trelew-Tecka. Bien atendido y con un buen servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's the most complete service station on the Trelew-Tecka section of National Route 25. Well-staffed and with good service.
